title: I've been building free Notion templates for a few months — here's everything I made
body:
Started building Notion templates for myself and decided to share them all for free.

Everything is free to download, just pay what you want if you find it useful.

Here's what I've built so far:

- **Habit Tracker** — daily log, streak counter, weekly completion rate
- **Weekly Planner** — time-blocked week view, priorities, reflection
- **Personal Finance** — income/expenses, monthly overview, category budgets
- **Job Application Tracker** — pipeline view, status tracking, follow-up reminders
- **Product Roadmap** — feature backlog, status board, release planning
- **Book Tracker** — reading list, notes, monthly reading stats

All work on Notion's free plan. EN/DE included in each.

Happy to answer questions about any of them.

→ [All templates on Gumroad — free, pay what you want](https://tinycraft.gumroad.com)

title: 6 free Notion templates I use to organize my whole life (habits, money, job search, reading)
body:
Built these over the past few months because I couldn't find templates that did exactly what I wanted.

All free — pay what you want if they're useful:

- **Habit Tracker** — streak formula, category system, monthly calendar
- **Weekly Planner** — structured week blocks, priority system, weekly review
- **Personal Finance** — expense categories, monthly snapshot, savings tracking
- **Job Tracker** — application pipeline, company notes, interview prep
- **Product Roadmap** — backlog to launch, status tracking, feature voting
- **Book Tracker** — reading list, progress, rating system

All run on the free Notion plan. Available in English and German.

Let me know if you want to see screenshots of any specific one.

→ [Free on Gumroad](https://tinycraft.gumroad.com)
